The '''Jedi enclave''' was a small [[Jedi training/Legends|Jedi training]] center established on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] some time between the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], which was run by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]].

==Layout==
Set back from the hustle and bustle of [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]], the Enclave consisted of two one-story wings that spread out from the central structure, which was crowned by a spiraling tower. The two wings consisted of small classrooms that were filled with small desks and posters of ancient [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]]. While there were [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] instructors, [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] were used to assist teachers. The center tower was used for office space and communications center that allowed Master [[Corran Horn/Legends|Horn]] to remain in contact with the [[New Jedi Temple|Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==History==
During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], the [[Five Worlds|Corellian government]] labeled all Jedi enemies of the state. During a mission to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], Master [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] infiltrated the locked-down Enclave and ordered its occupants off world. Fleeing the Enclave, the five [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]] and the other Jedi returned to the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Ossus Academy]] to train away from the war.
